subject: [PATCH v2 08/18] zonefs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for the zonefs filesystem to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is a more efficient way of handling mapping operations. The conversion uses the iomap_process() helper function to finish previous mappings and produce the next one. No functional changes are intended by this conversion.
